commands: Expand the target market demographics to include other age groups and income levels, such as Gen X and baby boomers, who may also be interested in health beverages.
Incorporate a detailed analysis of the income levels within the target demographics to ensure the pricing strategy is accessible and competitive for all potential consumers.
Consider additional demand factors such as environmental sustainability and ethical sourcing, which are increasingly important to consumers in the beverage market.
Include a more comprehensive competitive analysis that not only evaluates existing products but also identifies gaps in the market that our beverage could fill.
